# Soft49 Async38 Tool5k Contract

## Soft 49
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.49 so full summaries start earlier under long sessions

## Async 38
async pre-rot and swarm micro pressure default to 0.38 so reclaim starts earlier

## Tool 5k
tool result budgets default to 5000 chars with 90-char previews for denser reclaim

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/tool/status-panel vitest
